channel.title: Home on Sandbox
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Sandbox

item.title: Now
item.description: I am … … looking forward to a few winter day-long and long-weekend trips with my wife … dreaming of the end of this global pandemic This is a Now page. You should have one too.

item.title: Colophon
item.description: The views expressed is built by Hugo, hosted on GitHub Pages, and cached by Cloudflare. It is developed on an Apple MacBook using VSCode, Hyper, and Zsh. Content is written with a variety of editing tools. Text usually starts in Drafts on an iPhone or an iPad, and sometimes, even on an Apple Watch. Some ideas gain flesh and substance with mind-mapping in MindNode. Content that takes time to develop is tracked with Things.
